productDisplayName: Hanes Men Grey Premium Sleeveless Crew T-shirt
description: Composition Grey sleeveless, crew neck T-shirt made of ComfortSoft 100% combed cotton, has a lay flat collar in white, white fabric strips on the right shoulder and armholes with white trim edges Fit Comfort Wash care Machine wash warm with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron Lightweight with a round neck, this hanes sleeveless T-shirt in ComfortSoft cotton is stylish, and yet relaxed. The lay flat collar never stretches out of shape even after repeated washes, while the fabric simply flows over your torso. Perfect on its own with jeans, this T-shirt also works great with shorts and track pants. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 6', Shoulders: 19"
